description_long: This is a classic chessboard with a square playing surface divided into an 8x8 grid of alternating dark brown and white squares. The board is framed by a thick, white border that features alphanumeric coordinates along its edges, aiding in move notation and gameplay. The chessboard is set up for a game, with both black and white chess pieces arranged in their starting positions, including pawns, rooks, knights, bishops, queens, and kings. The chess pieces are stylized in a traditional Staunton design, with the black pieces rendered in a matte black and the white pieces in a matte white. The board and pieces appear to be made of plastic or a similar hard, smooth material, giving the set a clean and modern look. The overall construction is solid and flat, suitable for placement on tables or park surfaces in urban environments.
description: A classic 8x8 chessboard with alternating brown and white squares, bordered by a white frame with alphanumeric coordinates and set up with traditional black and white chess pieces.
description_view_0: The chessboard is viewed from the white side, showing the white pieces in the foreground and the black pieces in the background, with clear visibility of the alphanumeric coordinates along the near edge.
description_view_1: This view is from the black side, highlighting the black pieces in the foreground and the white pieces in the background, with the board's coordinate markings visible along the near edge.
description_view_2: The board is seen from the left flank, providing a side perspective of both sets of pieces and the left-side coordinate markings.
description_view_3: The chessboard is viewed from the right flank, showing the right-side coordinate markings and a clear arrangement of both black and white pieces from a lateral angle.
attribute_board_pattern: The playing surface features a regular grid of 64 squares arranged in an 8x8 pattern, with alternating dark brown and white squares. Each square is perfectly square-shaped, and the pattern is bordered by a wide, solid white frame. The border is inscribed with alphanumeric coordinates for each row and column, aiding in gameplay notation.
attribute_border_design: The border is a wide, solid white frame surrounding the playing area, with clearly printed black alphanumeric coordinates (A-H and 1-8) along all four edges. The border is smooth, unornamented, and visually contrasts with the checkered playing surface.
